rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CODESYS in Festo Automation Suite
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_ip:
        dst_ip:
            - '2.8.0.137'
            - '2.8.0.138'
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*certvde.com*'
            - '*festo.csaf-tp.certvde.com*'
    condition: selection_ip or selection_dns
level: high
suricata: alert ip any any -> 2.8.0.137 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CODESYS_in_Festo_Automation_Su"; sid:7681850; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 2.8.0.138 any (msg:"CDB APEX — CODESYS_in_Festo_Automation_Su"; sid:6686820; rev:1;)
snort: alert ip any any -> 2.8.0.137 any (msg:"CDB APEX CODESYS_in_Festo_Automation_Su"; sid:3099526; rev:1;)
alert ip any any -> 2.8.0.138 any (msg:"CDB APEX CODESYS_in_Festo_Automation_Su"; sid:6025100; rev:1;)
